channel.title: Old Testament
channel.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
channel.itunes:summary: Personal feed for Eric Wilde — official chapter-by-chapter audio of the Old Testament, streamed from the Church's CDN. Audio © Intellectual Reserve, Inc.; for personal study.
channel.description: Chapter-by-chapter audio of the Old Testament, from the official Church CDN. Personal use only.
